title: A heartfelt thank you, George - from your friendly family pharmacy
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are truly honoured to...
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We are truly honoured to have been voted the best of George for the third consecutive year.


> On behalf of the entire E. Coetzee Pharmacy team, we extend our sincere thanks to the George community for your continued trust and support.


Our story began in 1976, when Mr and Mrs Coetzee moved to George and Mr Coetzee started working at this very pharmacy.

In 1980, he purchased the pharmacy and renamed it E. Coetzee Pharmacy.

For the past 49 years, we’ve proudly served the community with compassion, professionalism and personalised care.

Egmond and Bets Coetzee.

This recognition would not have been possible without our loyal customers. Your support inspires us daily. We are equally grateful to our incredible staff; your dedication and hard work are the heart of our success.

At E. Coetzee Pharmacy, our customers are at the centre of everything we do. We strive to build lasting relationships and deliver healthcare with a personal touch.


> Operating hours


Pharmacy

- Mon – Fri: 08:00 – 21:00
- Sat: 09:00 – 13:30 & 17:30 – 21:00
- Sun & Public Holidays: 09:00 – 12:30 & 17:30 – 21:00

Clinic

- Mon, Wed – Fri: 08:00 – 17:30
- Tues: 08:00 – 13:00 & 17:00 – 20:00
- Last Sat of the Month: 09:00 – 13:00


> Our services


Prescription dispensing and medical suppliesSafe, accurate dispensing of prescribed medication by qualified professionals.

Nebuliser rentals available for short-term or cost-effective use.

Home deliveriesWeekdays: 08:00 – 19:00 | Saturday: 09:00 – 13:30 (excluding public holidays)

Our customers are at the centre of everything we do.

Self-medication & supplementsA wide selection of vitamins, self-care products and unscheduled medicines.

Blister packingCustom, convenient, organised medication to improve adherence and reduce risk of missed doses.

In-house clinicWe provide health consultations, blood tests, baby immunisations, wound care and chronic condition support, all delivered by our professional nurse.

Beauty salonOffering facials, waxing, manicures, pedicures, Epilfree, and more.

Cosmetics departmentExplore high-quality skincare, make-up, fragrances and grooming essentials.

Tanning boothAnti-wrinkle collagen red UV lamps and skin rejuvenating LED technology.

Additional offerings

- Wound care & baby products
- Stationery, toys, batteries
- Photo printing, ID & passport photos
- Ear & nose piercings
- Gifts and more


> Come and visit us


Whether you need medication, clinic services or self-care products, we invite you to experience the personal care that sets us apart.

Visit us in-store at 72 York Street, call or connect with us online. We’re here to support your health and your future.

Thank you, George. We look forward to serving you for many more years to come.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
